🔄 From SEO to GEO

Drag each SEO concept to its GEO equivalent

How to Play

Drag the SEO concepts from the left and drop them onto their matching GEO equivalent on the right. Match all 6 to complete the challenge!

SEO Concepts
Ranking on a list
Optimize for position #1
Keywords
Compete on search terms
Backlinks
Build authority through links
Title tag
What matters for ranking
More content helps
Volume effect
Blue links
What buyers see
→
→
→
→
→
→
GEO Equivalents
Citation in a synthesis Optimize for being quoted
Entity authority Compete on expertise signals
Structured proof points Build authority through data
Schema markup What matters for citation
Better structure helps Quality over quantity
Synthesized answer What buyers see
Matches: 0 / 6
